race.comment: STRAWBERRY IMPACT (8) underrated gelding bursting to win in this class. Slashing first-up run when third at Kembla Grange, then he didn't get conditions to suit from the wide gate when sixth over 1600m at Warwick Farm. Should get the right tempo here and take holding out. VIEWPOINT (13) improving gelding who can go quickly through the grades this time in. Never troubled on resumption with a comfortable victory over 1400m here with the 59kg. Can get cover early and not without top-three prospects. AUDREY'S LANE (4) handy mare at her peak for this fourth-up. Ready for this trip and looks to get a good set-up again. Each way. BELLA KHADIJAH (15) had mixed luck in all four runs this time in and capable of better today with Nock's claim. Blinkers stay on and expect to see her race closer from the low draw. THE MONA LISA (12) maps well in this weaker race.
